assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'. changes-log.md line 6 confirms: 'trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend — preserved as-is'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. changes-log.md line 28 confirms: 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui — added (newly discovered Serena instance)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747. changes-log.md lines 9-13 confirm all five fields preserved.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has two major sections: '## Preserved (unchanged)' (lines 3-20) listing trustify-backend, all Jira fields, Code Intelligence content, and Bug Configuration; and '## Added (new)' (lines 22-29) listing trustify-ui and serena_ui limitation entry.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 17-19: 'Discovered instances: 1. serena_backend — already in Repository Registry. Skipped. 2. serena_ui — NOT in Repository Registry. Newly discovered.' Summary lines 65-66 also confirm: 'Already configured: 1 (serena_backend)', 'Newly added: 1 (serena_ui)'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-34 preserve naming convention text ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol), and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index'). Only addition is line 34: 'serena_ui: No known limitations'. changes-log.md lines 17-18 confirm preservation, line 31 confirms the only addition.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 37-40: '## Bug Configuration' with Bug issue type ID: 10001, Bug template: docs/bug-template.md, Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks. discovery-log.md line 54: 'Result: **Bug Configuration is up to date** — no changes needed.'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 57: 'Security Configuration does not exist.' Line 58: 'User was asked whether to enable security triage.' Line 60: 'Result: **User declined** — Security Configuration will not be created.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 41 with Bug Configuration).
